zh.Of,Henin Lietard,Pas-De-Calais,France: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特
zh.Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯
zh.Hénin-Beaumont, Liétard, Pas-de-Calais,: 法國帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Barbancon於大約1465年出生在法國時，他的父親Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon38歲，母親Jeanne de Saarbrücken30歲。他於1481年與Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年4月27日享年46歲。

zh-hans.Of,Henin Lietard,Pas-De-Calais,France: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Barbancon于大约1465年出生在法国时，他的父亲Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon38岁，母亲Jeanne de Saarbrücken30岁。他于1481年与Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀尼-波奧蒙特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1510年4月27日享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Barbancon was born about 1465, in France, his father, Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon, was 38 and his mother, Jeanne de Saarbrücken, was 30. He married Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard in 1481, in Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 27 April 1510, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Barbancon est né environ 1465, à France, son père, Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Saarbrücken, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard en 1481, à Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1510, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Barbancon um 1465 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon 38 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Saarbrücken 30. Er hat 1481 in Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. April 1510 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Barbancon è nato il circa 1465 nel Francia, il suo padre, Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Saarbrücken, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard nel 1481, nel Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 aprile 1510, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Barbanconが約1465年にフランスで生まれた時，父Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbanconは38歳，母Jeanne de Saarbrückenは30歳であった。1481年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスheニン-ベアウモントでGabrielle van Hénin-Liétardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1510年4月27日に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Barbancon(이)가 대략 1465년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Saarbrücken(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1481년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 he닌-보몽에서 Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 4월 27일 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Barbancon nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em França, seu pai, Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Saarbrücken, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard em 1481, em Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1510, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Barbancon родился около 1465 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Saarbrücken, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard в 1481 г. в местности хeнин-бомонт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 апреля 1510 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Barbancon nació aproximadamente 1465, en Francia, su papá, Seigneur de Cany-sur-Matz Christophe de Barbancon, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Saarbrücken, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Gabrielle van Hénin-Liétard en 1481, en Hénin-Beaumont, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de abril de 1510, a la edad de 46 años.
